p: Creation of creatives for various platforms
I worked on creating marketing creatives for EngageLab, focusing on visually compelling and conversion-driven designs.
One of the main challenges was balancing creativity with performance — some designs looked visually appealing but didn’t convert effectively.
I addressed this by building a flexible design system with reusable components, ensuring both consistency and scalability.

/about.title: LiQuId
/about.description: Liquid portfolio. I'm a UI/UX designer.
h2: what I can do for you
p: I’m a digital designer working on product interfaces and marketing visuals, creating experiences that are both clear and engaging.
I turn ideas into clean, structured designs with a focus on clarity and usability.
As a digital designer, I create interfaces and visuals that not only look clean but actually perform.
I combine product thinking with marketing approach — designing experiences that are intuitive, fast, and conversion-focused.
Wireframing and rapid prototyping for digital products
Designing clean and scalable interfaces for and mobile
Building and maintaining design systems in Figma
Improving user flows and visual hierarchy
Social media graphics and ad creatives

From curious creator to full-time designer, my path has been shaped by a passion for crafting purposeful, user-centered digital experiences—blending storytelling, structure, and design into every project.
I build with intention. Framer for fast, interactive web design. Figma for clean interfaces. Notion and X for content. Each tool supports how I think, design.
Where I connect, share insights, and grow within the design and Framer community.
My process blends strategy and creativity to address challenges, craft solutions, and deliver designs that effectively communicate your message.
In this phase, I dive deep into understanding your business, target audience, and project goals. Through research and strategic planning, I create a clear roadmap to guide the entire design process.
Here, I brainstorm and develop creative concepts that align with your vision. Initial sketches and ideas are refined into tangible wireframes, setting the direction for design and functionality.
Collaboration is key. I review the design with you, gather feedback, and refine the work to align with your expectations and goals. This ensures the design reflects your vision.
I conduct thorough testing to identify and resolve any performance or usability issues. This phase ensures the design works seamlessly across devices and meets user experience standards.
Once everything is finalized, the project is launched and delivered to you. I also provide guidance or support for ongoing maintenance to ensure long-term success.
Let’s build something impactful together—whether it’s your brand, your website, or your next big idea.
